title: CIEE
html:
CIEE

The Council on International Educational Exchange — the study-abroad program provider through which Yahir spent fall 2024 at East China Normal University (ECNU) in Shanghai. CIEE is the vehicle for the Shanghai study abroad arc and, by extension, the institutional gate that the broader China chapter passed through. The entity itself appears almost exclusively as administrative-thread material in Yahir's notes — the bills, the paperwork, the housing logistics — but its load-bearing role in the graph is total: without CIEE, no Shanghai semester, and arguably no Austin decision afterward.

The first appearance is in 2024 05 13 things / 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip (May 2024) — "complete all of CIEE stuff", "review CIEE bill" — sandwiched between the OSU finals push, the India/Nepal backpack route research, the OpenAI GPT-4o announcement landing as monumental, and the parallel Ford (via Zane) + JCEF (via Quin) scholarship-release coordination. CIEE is the bill that the Ford and JCEF disbursements get routed against. The pre-trip mega-notebook 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook expands the operational layer: ECNU oral and written midterms, contact lists for locals to meet, Mei Dong for visa coordination, Shanghai sidequests, CIEE payments throughout. By the time Yahir lands in Shanghai in September 2024, CIEE has functioned as the bureaucratic spine of an eight-month preparation arc.

What CIEE matters for in the broader graph is structural rather than narrative. It is the third leg of the funded-trajectory infrastructure (alongside Ford and JCEF) — Ford gives the foundational money, JCEF gives the operational top-ups, CIEE is what those dollars get spent on. The whole OSU → study-abroad → China-chapter → Austin path runs through this pipe. The 12-line operational mention of CIEE in the May/June 2024 notes does the work of months of coordination — finalizing housing, course registration, visa-letter generation, in-country support staffing.

Reverse-cited from later notes, CIEE is rarely named — once Yahir is in Shanghai, the program fades from the foreground and the city itself becomes the subject. The entity's footprint in the graph is therefore pre-trip-heavy: most of its mentions cluster in 4-5 weeks of summer 2024 admin, and then it disappears as Yahir's attention shifts to the lived experience itself (2024 09 12 never forget do whatever, 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future, 2024 12 14 departing china).

Source summaries

  • 2024 05 13 things
  • 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip
  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook
